---
name: research
description: Use when starting new feature work or investigating a problem before planning
---

# Research — Interrogate, Scope, Define

The starting point for any new work. Before building, interrogate the problem.

## Process

Use the file reading (via exec_command with cat/nl) to read the current codebase context.
Use the exec_command to run discovery commands.
Use the exec_command with rg to search for patterns.

## Transition

After completing research outputs, use the `$samsara-planning` skill skill.
